text.title: API Versioning Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the api-versioning methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: detect-breaking-change
step.action: Run oasdiff breaking with --fail-on ERR. Classify each diff as additive vs breaking.
step.output: diff.json with breaking changes (may be empty)
step.decision-gate: If no breaking changes, STOP — no version bump needed.

step.name: decide-version-strategy
step.action: Apply rule additive-first + url-path-default. Decide: revert change, add nullable field, or create vN+1.
step.decision-gate: If decision != vN+1, apply the additive alternative and STOP.

step.name: scaffold-vN+1
step.action: Copy the affected handlers into v(N+1) module. Edit response shape. Mount the new router in the application factory.
step.output: v(N+1) router file + updated router registration

step.name: wire-deprecation-middleware
step.input: ops/sunset.yaml entry for vN route + middleware
step.action: Mark the vN route as deprecated in ops/sunset.yaml; ensure middleware injects Deprecation/Sunset/Link headers.

step.name: ship-and-measure
step.action: Deploy; verify per-version traffic split visible. Announce deprecation 6 months in advance.
step.decision-gate: Sunset only after 30 days of zero traffic on vN.
